betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Item IO Circuit Board§f (advancedrocketry:ic:4) is the §6item-handling circuit board§f in the AR progression. It is the §6required component§f for any machine that needs to push or pull §6items§f in or out of its internal inventory — every §6Input Hatch§f, §6Output Hatch§f, and §6Chest Interface§f in the AR machine family uses this board.

§6Production Path (iocircuitboard.json + iocircuitboard_prec.json)§f:
- Vanilla recipe (iocircuitboard.json):
  - Type: §6minecraft:crafting_shaped§f
  - Pattern (3×3):
    ```
    r v r
    d w d
    d p d
    ```
  - Key: `r`=§6dustRedstone§f, `v`=§6gemQuartz§f, `d`=§6dustGold§f, `w`=§6slabWood§f, `p`=§6plateIron§f
  - Output: 1x §6Item IO Circuit Board§f (advancedrocketry:ic:4)
- Precision Assembler recipe (iocircuitboard_prec.json) at 200 ticks, 10 RF/t, produces 1 board from §6dustRedstone§f, §6plateGold§f, §6plateSteel§f

The board is the §6input/output interface§f for the §6Lathe§f (10010), §6Rolling Machine§f (10011), §6Precision Assembler§f (10012), §6Cutting Machine§f (10008), §6Crystallizer§f (10006), §6Electric Arc Furnace§f (10004), §6Chemical Reactor§f (10017), §6Precision Laser Etcher§f (10015), and the §6Railgun§f (10069). It is consumed at a rate of 1 per machine built.

The Item IO circuit board is a prerequisite for every AR machine that has an inventory. It is also used by the §6AE2 1k ME Storage Component§f (appliedenergistics2:material:35) recipe as a circuit ingredient.

§eTip§f: The board is the §6most-demanded ic:4 variant§f in AR — build a §6Precision Assembler§f (10012) production line that runs continuously, because manual crafting is too slow. Stockpile 64+ boards before any serious machine construction.
